scripts.dev:web: concurrently -k -n backend,vite -c green,cyan "npm:backend" "npm --prefix frontend run vite"
scripts.kill-backend: powershell -NoProfile -Command "$c = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8765 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if ($c) { $c.OwningProcess | Sort-Object -Unique | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; Write-Host 'killed' } else { Write-Host 'no listener' }"
